title: CTF Near-Duplicate Detection: ECFP-Inspired Text Fingerprints
summary: Generated a complete 11-page LaTeX paper titled 'Circular Text Fingerprints: Evaluating ECFP-Inspired Neighborhood Hashing for Near-Duplicate Short-Text Detection'. The paper includes all six sections (Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion, Related Work, Conclusion) fully written from the provided paper_text. All 1 figure from available_figures (fig2_v0.jpg — stratified F1 performance bar chart, aspect ratio 21:9) was included using \begin{figure*}[!t] full-width placement on page 5, with correct caption and label. A confusion matrix comparison table was also included. Bibliography (references.bib) was built using aii_semscholar_bib__fetch for 12 references: 5 were auto-fetched (Rogers2010, McNemar1947, Dietterich1998, Efron1979, Devlin2019, Charikar2002, Maggiora2014), and the remaining (Broder1997, Broder2000, Hahn2013, Hu2019, EfronTibshirani1993, Iyer2017, StanfordIR, ScikitLearnTfidf) were written manually from verified paper metadata. Compilation used the full pdflatex/bibtex/pdflatex/pdflatex sequence with no errors. Visual review of all 11 pages confirmed clean layout: no overlapping text, no cut-off content, figure rendered correctly, table formatted properly, references complete. PDF is 1.6MB.
